name: OpenFOAM · run case (generic solver)
description: A reusable, solver-agnostic OpenFOAM integration node. Take a complete OpenFOAM case (a `{relative-path: file-content}` bundle) and a solver name, run blockMesh (optional) → `<solver>` → foamToVTK (optional) in the opencfd/openfoam-default Docker image, and return RAW results: the solver log, the exported field series (as an artifact key a downstream node can retrieve), and the contents of every `postProcessing/**/*.dat` file. No physics interpretation — a downstream node extracts whatever metrics it needs, so the same node backs a structural solve, a CFD run, a DOE sweep, or a one-shot check. `dry_run` short-circuits the solve (returns `not_run`); a missing Docker image or a non-zero solver exit returns `success=false` rather than raising, so the caller decides whether a failed solve is fatal.

pack.name: OpenFOAM Core
pack.description: Core OpenFOAM integration nodes shipped with the platform.
